mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM news
AND type = #{type}

SELECT n.id, n.title, n.type, n.content, n.author, n.news_date, n.created_at, ni.id AS img_id, ni.news_id, ni.image_path, ni.sort_order FROM news n LEFT JOIN news_image ni ON n.id = ni.news_id WHERE n.id = #{id} ORDER BY ni.sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news (title, type, content, author, news_date) VALUES (#{title}, #{type}, #{content}, #{author}, #{newsDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE news SET title = #{title}, type = #{type}, content = #{content}, author = #{author}, news_date = #{newsDate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news_image (news_id, image_path, sort_order) VALUES (#{newsId}, #{imagePath}, #{sortOrder})
